name: PMI PMP (Project Management Professional)
description: Gold-standard project management certification recognised globally across industries.
cost_source: PMI Official (May 2026) — $405 for PMI members, $555 for non-members. PMI membership ~$139/year.
exam_format: 180 questions — mix of multiple choice, multiple response, matching, hotspot, and fill-in-the-blank
passing_score_note: PMI does not publish a fixed passing score. Results reported as proficiency levels: Above Target, Target, Below Target, Needs Improvement.
renewal_cost_note: $60 for PMI members, $150 for non-members every 3 years
renewal_method: Earn 60 PDUs (Professional Development Units) within 3-year cycle
salary_boost_source: PMI Earning Power Salary Survey / Glassdoor (estimated)
prerequisites: High school diploma + 5 years PM experience + 35 contact hours OR 4-year degree + 3 years PM experience + 35 contact hours
